title.v: chỉ tiêu dòng tiền theo nhiều kỳ

header.v: Mã số, mã số khi in

footer.v: 1 - Theo số dư đầu kỳ, 2 - Theo nguồn dữ liệu, 0 - Tính theo mã số
footer.e: 1 - On Opening Balance, 2 - On Data Source, 0 - Formula

text.v: 7. Kế hoạch dòng tiền theo tháng
8. Kế hoạch dòng tiền theo tuần

dir.commands: select 'loadForm$&controller;$Dir(this);' as message return select 'loadForm$&controller;$Dir(this);' as message return declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$existsCal nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã số %s đã có, không thể lưu được.' else N'The code %s already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Công thức %s khai báo không đúng.' else N'Formula %s is invalid.' end select @$existsCal = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tồn tại bản ghi trùng cách tính.' else N'The calculating way already exists.' end &Set; if not exists (select 1 from v20dmmaubc where ma_maubc = '&defaultForm;' and form = @c) begin declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mẫu báo cáo đã được xóa.' else N'Report form has been deleted.' end select 'ma_so' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if exists(select * from @@table where ma_so = @ma_so and form = @form) begin select 'ma_so' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_so)) as message return end if (exists(select 1 from @@table where cuoi_ky = 1 and form = @form) and @cuoi_ky = 1) begin select 'cuoi_ky' as field, @$existsCal as message return end if (exists(select 1 from @@table where kind = 1 and form = @form) and @kind = 1) begin select 'kind' as field, @$existsCal as message return end &Check; &AfterUpdate; select @form as form return &Set; &Check; declare @endPeriod tinyint, @typeCal tinyint select @endPeriod = cuoi_ky, @typeCal = kind from @@table where form = $form.OldValue and stt = $stt.OldValue and ma_so = $ma_so.OldValue if @cuoi_ky <> @endPeriod begin if (exists(select 1 from @@table where cuoi_ky = 1 and form = @form) and @cuoi_ky = 1) begin select 'cuoi_ky' as field, @$existsCal as message return end end if @kind <> @typeCal begin if (exists(select 1 from @@table where kind = 1 and form = @form) and @kind = 1) begin select 'kind' as field, @$existsCal as message return end end &AfterUpdate; if exists(select 1 from @@table where form = @form and charindex('[' + ltrim(rtrim(@ma_so)) + ']', cach_tinh) > 0) begin declare @$deleteConflict nvarchar(4000) select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã số %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the item %s. It has already been used.' end select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_so)) as message return end &CheckIrregular;
